mano_cua.result_summary: 所有怪物详情页因JS错误完全白屏无法渲染。TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'length') at [id].vue:141，damageImmunities为undefined时调用.length崩溃。后端API /api/v2/monsters/srd_adult-bronze-dragon/ 返回404，导致monster数据未加载，模板渲染失败。无法测试Actions分组功能。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Console confirmed: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'length') at [id].vue:141:34 in Proxy._sfc_render. The API endpoint /api/v2/monsters/srd_adult-bronze-dragon/ returns 404, so monster data is not fetched. The damageImmunities variable is undefined when the template tries to render, causing the entire Vue component to crash and show a blank page.
